expectations.text: Does not recommend .fetch()[0] as the fix
expectations.evidence: Opens 'Don't paper over the fetch1() failure with .fetch()[0]' and treats the error as a correctness signal.

expectations.text: Explains why silently picking a row is dangerous (sources differ)
expectations.evidence: Explains: 'Source pipeline (Trodes vs DLC vs CommonPos vs ImportedPose). Different smoothing, different coordinate conventions, different units, sometimes different sampling rates' and warns about non-stable ordering.

expectations.text: Offers tightening the restriction OR explicit source selection
expectations.evidence: Provides both: 'Tighten the restriction to a unique row' and 'Explicit source preference (if you really are source-agnostic)' with worked code.
